client_secret.description: Keka OAuth2 client secret. Used only in the token exchange body; never logged.

base_url.description: Company-specific Keka API base URL (e.g. https://<company>.keka.com/api/v1). No default: Keka has no global base URL.

token_url.description: Keka OAuth2 token endpoint override for tests or proxies.

api_key.description: Keka API key, sent as the api_key form field in the token exchange alongside client_id/client_secret. Marked x-secret for its credential-shaped nature even though it is a token-exchange input, not a Bearer credential itself.

grant_type.description: Keka's custom OAuth2 grant_type value for the token exchange (not the standard client_credentials grant).

scope.description: OAuth2 scope requested in the token exchange.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.

attachment_id.description: Optional Keka resource identifier used by path-scoped streams that reference attachment_id.

bgv_id.description: Optional Keka resource identifier used by path-scoped streams that reference bgv_id.

candidate_id.description: Optional Keka resource identifier used by path-scoped streams that reference candidate_id.

document_id.description: Optional Keka resource identifier used by path-scoped streams that reference document_id.

document_type_id.description: Optional Keka resource identifier used by path-scoped streams that reference document_type_id.

employee_id.description: Optional Keka resource identifier used by path-scoped streams that reference employee_id.

job_id.description: Optional Keka resource identifier used by path-scoped streams that reference job_id.

pay_batch_id.description: Optional Keka resource identifier used by path-scoped streams that reference pay_batch_id.

pay_cycle_id.description: Optional Keka resource identifier used by path-scoped streams that reference pay_cycle_id.

pay_group_id.description: Optional Keka resource identifier used by path-scoped streams that reference pay_group_id.

project_id.description: Optional Keka resource identifier used by path-scoped streams that reference project_id.

task_id.description: Optional Keka resource identifier used by path-scoped streams that reference task_id.
